untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detection of ascending broadening wedge formation, lower/upper trend line identification, and partial rise behavior. These geometric pattern elements cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Trend line detection, wedge geometry validation, and partial rise confirmation require multi-bar pattern analysis or custom pattern-recognition logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex chart pattern (ascending broadening wedge with specific price action sequence) that fundamentally requires trend line detection and pattern geometry analysis. The entry condition 'prices touch lower trend line then rise without reaching upper trend line before downward breakout' cannot be operationalized with the available indicators. A simplified proxy entry using 'price breaks below previous low' is provided but does not capture the true pattern intent. This signal would require either: (1) custom trend line detection logic, (2) multi-bar pattern matching, or (3) manual chart pattern identification.
